Package org.mitre.synthea.modules.covid

Class C19Vaccine

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.modules.covid.C19Vaccine
public class C19Vaccine extends Object
This class provides information on the currently Emergency Use Authorized (EUA) vaccines in the United States. It also provides functionality to select a vaccine based on national usage statistics.

Note that the Pfizer vaccine has received full approval from the FDA, so technically it is no longer under EUA.

  • Field Details

    • EUAs

      public static final Map<C19Vaccine.EUASet,C19Vaccine> EUAs
      Map of EUA keys to their object representation

  • Constructor Details

    • C19Vaccine

      public C19Vaccine(String display, String cvx, boolean twoDose, double usagePercentage, long timeBetweenDoses)
      Create an instance of a COVID-19 Vaccine by supplying information on it.
      Parameters:
      display - The display text for the vaccine
      cvx - The CVX code for the vaccine
      twoDose - Should be true if the vaccine requires two doses
      usagePercentage - What percentage of Americans have received this vaccine
      timeBetweenDoses - For two dose vaccines, milliseconds between doses. 0 for one dose vaccines.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public static void initialize()
      Initialize the class level information on vaccination. Needed so that selectShot will work.

    • selectShot

      public static C19Vaccine.EUASet selectShot(Person person)
      Select a vaccine to be used for an individual.
      Parameters:
      person - to vaccinate
      Returns:
      a vaccine to use

      public String getDisplay()
      Get the display name of the vaccine.

      The display name as a string.

      public String getCvx()
      Get the CVX code for the vaccine.

      public void setCvx(String cvx)

      Parameters:
      cvx - The CVX code to set.

    • isTwoDose

      public boolean isTwoDose()
      Check if the vaccine requires two doses.
      Returns:
      True if the vaccine requires two doses, otherwise false.

    • setTwoDose

      public void setTwoDose(boolean twoDose)
      Set whether the vaccine requires two doses.
      Parameters:
      twoDose - True if the vaccine requires two doses, otherwise false.

    • getUsagePercentage

      public double getUsagePercentage()
      Get the usage percentage of the vaccine.
      Returns:
      The usage percentage as a double.

      Set the usage percentage of the vaccine.

    • getTimeBetweenDoses

      public long getTimeBetweenDoses()
      Get the time between doses for a two-dose vaccine.
      Returns:
      The time between doses in milliseconds.

    • setTimeBetweenDoses

      public void setTimeBetweenDoses(long timeBetweenDoses)
      Set the time between doses for a two-dose vaccine.
      Parameters:
      timeBetweenDoses - The time between doses in milliseconds to set.
